texto: Everyone has got their own ideas and they push them and say to hell with everyone else. That's the history of the human race. It got us on top, only now it is pushing us off. The thing is that people will put up with any kind of discomfort, and dying babies, and old age at thirty as long as it has always been that way. Try to get them to change and they fight you, even while they're dying, saying it was good enough for grandpa so it's good enough for me. Bango, dead.
explicacao: Citação de Harry Harrison sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Everyone has got their own ideas and they push them and say to hell with everyone else. That's th…” articula reflexao, death, overpopulation em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e mudanca.

frase_original: Everyone has got their own ideas and they push them and say to hell with everyone else. That's the history of the human race. It got us on top, only now it is pushing us off. The thing is that people will put up with any kind of discomfort, and dying babies, and old age at thirty as long as it has always been that way. Try to get them to change and they fight you, even while they're dying, saying it was good enough for grandpa so it's good enough for me. Bango, dead.

texto: The principles we live by in business and in social life are the most important part of happiness.
explicacao: Citação de Harry Harrison sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The principles we live by in business and in social life are the most important part of happiness.” articula reflexao, happiness, principles em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
